ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot carefully receiving and then opening a fortune cookie.  The movement should be slow, deliberate, and convey a sense of anticipation and gentle handling. Frame 1 shows both arms extended forward, palms up, ready to receive the cookie. Frame 2 shows the right arm gently lowering to receive the cookie, while the left arm remains slightly raised. Frame 3 shows the cookie held in the right arm, with the left arm moving to assist in opening it. Frame 4 shows both arms working together to carefully open the cookie, and Frame 5 shows the cookie opened, with the fortune visible, and both arms in a relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, palms up, ready to receive
right arm lowers to take the cookie gently
left arm moves to help open the cookie
both arms carefully break the cookie apart
fortune revealed, arms relax after opening
